title: Reactome pathway-perturbation enrichment for EWSR1-FLI1 targets
context: Enrich the graph with Reactome pathway-perturbation context for EWSR1-FLI1 targets, after verifying the Reactome release license. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Add Reactome pathway-perturbation enrichment for EWSR1-FLI1 targets as provenance-bearing assertions, after confirming the Reactome release license.
acceptanceCriteria: Reactome release license is verified and recorded in the allow-list before extraction.
Pathway-perturbation assertions for EWSR1-FLI1 targets carry full provenance + source release.
Assertions pass CI (SHACL + Biolink + provenance + allow-list).
output: A Reactome pathway-perturbation enrichment dataset, committed via PR.
